nodes.label: draft6.0 context.md (full cold-start dump)
nodes.rationale: Everything one collaborating mind holds: substrate, math, history (drafts 1-5.1 attribution era), the person (Jakkrin), the 21-file north-star dossier, and the deep recurring truths.

nodes.label: Forward-Forward (Hinton 2022)
nodes.rationale: Replaces the backward pass with two forward passes (positive/negative), training each layer locally to be loud on positives/quiet on negatives; weak point = where the negatives come from (Hinton faked with corrupted labels). SCFF fixes this by building pos/neg from the data itself.

nodes.label: Mono-forward (dual-rail SCFF on silicon)
nodes.rationale: One forward sweep carrying a positive + negative world side by side through the SAME shared weight crossbar; only the cheap LocalCapacitor activation buffers double, NOT the Scaps. Trades ~2x cheap RAM buffers for one charge cycle instead of two. The author's own circuit idea.

nodes.label: Summation reformulation (W1=W2)
nodes.rationale: The paper pairs by concatenation ([x_k,x_k], two blocks W1=W2 proven to emerge); the author uses summation with one shared W - exactly equal because W1=W2, and the smarter hardware move (halves input lines, enables mono-forward). Credit as the author's reformulation, not what SCFF does.

nodes.label: Complementary Learning Systems (McClelland/Kumaran)
nodes.rationale: Fast sparse hippocampus + slow distributed cortex, with replay consolidating one into the other; re-derived independently in the 5.x era (two-timescale Cortex/Hippocampus) and realized in draft 6 as sleep + LUT.

nodes.label: density != class (the recurring lesson)
nodes.rationale: SCFF-alone clusters by density, not class; the project's recurring silent killer wearing many coats - the same family as the missing-sign collapse and the XOR bug. Fixed by discriminative objectives (contrast) that preserve the class DIRECTION.

nodes.label: Copy the function, cheat the implementation
nodes.rationale: The project's motto/method: reproduce what the brain DOES, pay for each principle with whatever is cheap on the substrate (analog physics where physics is cheaper, modern DL math where math is cheaper). Modern ML doesn't brute-force nature - it projects it into a computable low dimension.

nodes.label: The missing-sign collapse (draft 5 -> 6 pivot)
nodes.rationale: June 2026: the attribution loss carried magnitude but never direction (sign), so nothing converged; routing the sign back would break locality. The symptom of a deeper error - assuming the brain is homogeneous; the brain is heterogeneous, build organ by organ.

nodes.label: North star: recurrent thinking brain (correctness-as-feeling)
nodes.rationale: The long-term target beyond the numbered phases: a recurrent lifelong-learning prefrontal<->hippocampus loop where correctness is a self-generated feeling (the halting/convergence of the loop), grounded by prediction-error. Deliberately not specced; simple intelligence first.

nodes.label: Jakkrin (the author)
nodes.rationale: Year-2 undergrad, solo, evening/weekend, bilingual EN/Thai; learns by reconstructing mechanism (matrix notation bounces off); breakthroughs from incubation not desk-grinding; keeps re-deriving published results from the circuit side before knowing their names.

nodes.label: ChronoForge (pure-FPGA 2D game engine)
nodes.rationale: The author's prior hardware: a pure-hardware FPGA 2D game engine, 640x480@60Hz in ~18k LUTs, no CPU/OS - evidence he has shipped real hardware (don't talk down).

hyperedges.label: The draft-6 two-brain neocortex (SCFF bulk + closed-form namer + LUT + gate + sleep + mono-forward)
